ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time point (e.g., day number) */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tract being monitored */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the disease */,
  "symptomatic" INTEGER /* Number of symptomatic cases reported at this time */,
  "cumulative_symptomatic" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of symptomatic cases reported up to this time */,
  "dead" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported at this time */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the health official who reported the case */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional observations or comments */,
  "date" TEXT /* Actual date of the case report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tract */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the tract */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tract */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the tract */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the tract */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the tract */,
  "demographic_info_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to detailed demographic information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease (e.g., Influenza) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Average incubation period in days */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Estimated transmission rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official in the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for communication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to user roles for permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_officials_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_range_start" TEXT /* Start date of the data range covered in the report */,
  "data_range_end" TEXT /* End date of the data range covered in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the notification */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the notification was generated */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official responsible for the notification */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided (e.g., demographic, historical) */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tract associated with the integrated data */,
  "date_integrated" TEXT /* Date when the data was integrated */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, epidemiologist) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
